description: Reality check: ship 51 skills in one week as solo dev

input.input_text: Plan: Push all 51 skills to GitHub repo with full AIO format (4 files each = 204 files), wire up build.py, test adapters for 3 LLM providers, and deploy API. Timeline: 1 week. Team: solo.

description: Quick low-energy check on a deployment claim

input.input_text: Claim: Cloud Run cold start is under 2 seconds for our container.
